channel.title: ppowershell on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: PSPam - Privileged Access Management via PowerShell
item.description: Update 2019-01-12: A Microsoft security update appears to have broken this solution. TL;DR the following describes a DIY method for granualar assignment of elevated permissions on Windows, using PowerShell Just Enough Administration (JEA) Background Most users logging on to a Windows client fall into one of the following categories: Full administrator Standard user Sometimes there is a need for a standard user to perform an elevated task, but granting full administrative access is undesirable.
